summary: Replayed ADR 0193 from the latest merged `origin/main`, preserved the topology-safe Plane controller defaults, reconverged the private controller lane and ADR-sync path, and then completed the authenticated public `tasks.lv3.org` publication after regenerating the shared edge artifacts required by NGINX.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest pytest -q tests/test_plane_runtime_role.py tests/test_plane_client.py tests/test_nginx_edge_publication_role.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_service_topology_filters.py` passed with `40 passed` on the merged-main candidate after hardening the Plane runtime defaults against host-topology lookup drift.

`make live-apply-service service=plane env=production ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true` reconverged the Proxmox proxy lane, PostgreSQL `plane_postgres`, the Docker runtime Plane stack, the Plane bootstrap, ADR sync, and the private health checks from merged-main commit `d28b283e`.

After regenerating the missing shared publication artifacts with `make generate-ops-portal`, `make generate-changelog-portal`, and `make docs`, `make configure-edge-publication env=production` completed successfully with `nginx-lv3 ok=62 changed=5 failed=0`.

verification.check: Private controller lane and bootstrap identity
verification.observed: `make plane-manage ACTION=whoami` reported controller URL `http://100.64.0.1:8011`, display name `ops`, email `ops@lv3.org`, workspace `lv3-platform`, and project identifier `ADR`.
The controller-local summary at `.local/plane/adr-sync-summary.json` recorded `count: 218` synchronized ADR issues in the live `lv3-platform` / `ADR` Plane project.

`curl -k -I https://tasks.lv3.org/` returned `HTTP/2 302` with `location: https://tasks.lv3.org/oauth2/sign_in?rd=https://tasks.lv3.org/`, while `curl http://100.64.0.1:8011/api/instances/` returned `200` for the private controller lane.

notes: This receipt supersedes the branch-local `2026-03-27-adr-0193-plane-live-apply` receipt as the canonical merged-main Plane replay evidence and will become the `versions/stack.yaml` receipt of record once the mainline platform version bump is written.
The shared Hetzner DNS lane was unblocked by repairing the provider-side `coolify.lv3.org` and `apps.lv3.org` A records to match the repo-declared topology before the final edge replay.

The first merged-main Plane replay surfaced a transient OpenBao sealed-state dependency during runtime secret injection; the final replay only proceeded after the local OpenBao API again reported `sealed: false`.

The Plane service itself was healthy before the shared edge replay finished; the last blocker was the missing `build/changelog-portal` and `build/docs-portal` publication artifacts needed by `nginx_edge_publication`.
